column1: Matt Olson leads the slate with a strong track record at home, a favorable platoon edge, and hits in six of his last seven games, making him a reliable pick against Aaron Nola. Yandy Diaz offers steady production from the leadoff spot and benefits from a hitter-friendly park, further boosting his appeal. Ernie Clement and Bobby Witt Jr. are also in play, but Olson’s combination of consistency and matchup stands out for Beat The Streak selections.
